creator: ac199@hwcn.org
text:
Just want to make sure that the reason send-pr isn't working
isn't some screw-up on my end...  Clearly, if you ever see this
bugreport it has either been fixed, or was bogus from the first
part...  apologies...

Fix: 

printf "Please fix gnats!\n" | mail mpp@freebsd.org
How-To-Repeat: Discover the one fundamental problem plagueing FreeBSD which
Terry Lambert is always discussing, and discover the fix, and
file a bugreport regarding this.  When we discover the one problem
preventing us from doing so, we have, in fact, proved the
Terry-ites correct.
